markets.question: Will Hyperliquid dip to $12 in March?
markets.description:
This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for HYPEUSDT during the month specified in the title (from 00:00 AM ET on the first day to 11:59 PM ET on the last) has a final Low price equal to or lower than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the HYPEUSDT Low prices available at https://www.binance.com/en/futures/HYPEUSDT, with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance HYPEUSDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.

markets.question: Spread: AS Monaco FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game, scheduled for March 14 at 4:05 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "AS Monaco FC" if AS Monaco FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Stade Brestois 29".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue1.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: AS Monaco FC vs. Stade Brestois 29: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game between AS Monaco FC and Stade Brestois 29, scheduled for March 14 at 4:05 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if AS Monaco FC and Stade Brestois 29 combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue1.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. markets.question: AS Monaco FC vs. Stade Brestois 29: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game between AS Monaco FC and Stade Brestois 29, scheduled for March 14 at 4:05 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both AS Monaco FC and Stade Brestois 29 each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.
